raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year>, I saw a pending charge by XXXX for a high amount of fee and few days later after it was posted, I filed a dispute with my bank for a {$250.00} charge from XXXX, as I had not received any refund at the time. Although I later received a partial refund of {$120.00} directly from XXXX, I still need to resolve the remaining {$120.00}. However, my bank closed my dispute almost immediately, citing a vague statement about my XXXX XXXX  and merchant policies. They advised me to contact XXXX directly, but I had already done that, and I believe my bank should have continued investigating the matter.
